name: UserProfiles
summary: The UserProfiles collector gathers data about local users on managed devices.

fields.name: accountdisabled
fields.description: True if the account is disabled. False otherwise. [a]

fields.name: domain
fields.description: The domain that holds the user. *

fields.name: installdate
fields.description: The creation date for the user's home folder ( C:\Users\user-name ). The user must log in at least once for this date to be returned.

fields.name: localaccount
fields.description: True if the user is stored locally on the device. False otherwise.

fields.name: lockedout
fields.description: True if the user has been locked out from the device. False otherwise. *

fields.name: sid
fields.description: The security identifier for the user.

fields.name: passwordexpires
fields.description: True if the password is configured to expire. False otherwise. *

examples.title: Example: Find user accounts that have been locked out from devices.
